title: Multiplication Distributes over Addition on Both Sides
statement:
Let $(P,S,1)$ be a Peano system. For every $a,b,c \in P$,
\[
a\cdot(b+c)=(a\cdot b)+(a\cdot c)
\qquad\text{and}\qquad
(a+b)\cdot c=(a\cdot c)+(b\cdot c).
\]

current_dependencies.title: Left Distributivity of Multiplication Over Addition
